---
title: "Certifications"
---

I have completed over 30 courses across two platforms — Kubicle and DataCamp — covering data analytics, Python, Power BI, Excel, SQL, and more. All Kubicle certificates are CPD Approved by Chartered Accountants Ireland.

## Summary

| | |
|---|---|
| **Total courses completed** | 30+ |
| **Platforms** | Kubicle, DataCamp |
| **CPD credits earned** | 45+ |
| **Accreditation** | Chartered Accountants Ireland (CPD Approved) |

## Featured Certificates

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## {{< fa brain >}} Predicting Future Values in AI Fundamentals
**Issuer:** Kubicle · **Date:** April 25, 2024 · **Credits:** 1.0 CPD

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} View Certificate](aicertificate.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## {{< fa code >}} Functions, Conditionality and Loops in Python Fundamentals
**Issuer:** Kubicle · **Date:** April 25, 2024 · **Credits:** 2.5 CPD

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} View Certificate](pythoncertificate.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## {{< fa chart-bar >}} Introduction to Visualizations in Power BI
**Issuer:** Kubicle · **Date:** June 18, 2024 · **Credits:** 2.0 CPD

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} View Certificate](powerbicertificate.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## {{< fa table >}} Finance Functions in Excel
**Issuer:** Kubicle · **Date:** March 8, 2024 · **Credits:** 1.0 CPD

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} View Certificate](financecertificate.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## {{< fa python >}} Introduction to NumPy
**Issuer:** DataCamp · **Date:** November 25, 2025 · **Length:** 4 hrs

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} View Certificate](datacampcertificate.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

:::

## All Kubicle Courses

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| eval: false

# This code documents the full list of Kubicle course completions
# organised by subject area

courses = {
    "AI Fundamentals": [
        ("Predicting Future Values in AI Fundamentals", "April 25, 2024", 1.0),
        ("Business Applications of AI in AI Fundamentals", "April 21, 2024", 1.0),
        ("Introduction to Artificial Intelligence in AI Fundamentals", "April 21, 2024", 1.0),
    ],
    "Data Ethics & Risk": [
        ("Introduction to Data Ethics in Data Ethics & Risk", "April 3, 2024", 1.0),
    ],
    "Data Literacy": [
        ("Planning a Data Driven Project in Data Literacy", "April 14, 2024", 1.0),
        ("Thinking and Communicating with Data in Data Literacy", "March 27, 2024", 1.5),
        ("Introduction to Data Preparation in Data Literacy", "March 14, 2024", 1.0),
        ("Introduction to Data and Databases in Data Literacy", "March 7, 2024", 1.0),
    ],
    "Data Presentation Skills": [
        ("Telling Stories with Data in Data Presentation Skills", "April 22, 2024", 1.0),
        ("Presenting Your Data in Data Presentation Skills", "April 20, 2024", 1.0),
        ("Communicating Data Effectively in Data Presentation Skills", "March 16, 2024", 1.0),
    ],
    "Data Security": [
        ("Handling Data Securely and Responsibly in Data Security", "April 22, 2026", 1.5),
        ("Keeping Your Information Safe in Data Security", "April 22, 2026", 1.0),
    ],
    "Excel": [
        ("Charts in Depth in Excel", "April 2024", 1.0),
        ("Lookups and Database Functions in Excel", "April 24, 2024", 2.0),
        ("Pivot Tables in Excel", "April 16, 2024", 2.0),
        ("Text, Time, and Dates in Excel", "March 13, 2024", 2.0),
        ("Finance Functions in Excel", "March 8, 2024", 1.0),
        ("Formulas and Functions in Excel", "November 24, 2022", 3.0),
        ("Data Manipulation and Formatting in Excel", "October 24, 2022", 2.0),
    ],
    "Power BI": [
        ("Introduction to Visualizations in Power BI", "June 18, 2024", 2.0),
        ("Building Your First Dashboard in Power BI", "June 18, 2024", 1.5),
    ],
    "Python Fundamentals": [
        ("Functions, Conditionality and Loops in Python Fundamentals", "April 25, 2024", 2.5),
        ("Python Fundamentals in Python Fundamentals", "April 25, 2024", 2.0),
    ],
    "SQL": [
        ("Understanding SQL Databases in SQL", "April 22, 2024", 1.5),
    ],
    "Statistical Analysis": [
        ("Probability Distributions in Statistical Analysis", "April 25, 2024", 2.0),
        ("Principles of Statistics in Statistical Analysis", "April 18, 2024", 1.5),
        ("Probability Principles in Statistical Analysis", "April 17, 2024", 1.5),
        ("Introduction to Predictive Modeling in Statistical Analysis", "April 16, 2024", 2.0),
    ],
    "Tableau": [
        ("Introducing Tableau in Tableau", "April 12, 2023", 1.5),
    ],
}

total_courses = sum(len(v) for v in courses.values())
total_credits = sum(c for v in courses.values() for _, _, c in v)
print(f"Total courses: {total_courses}")
print(f"Total CPD credits: {total_credits}")
```

### {{< fa brain >}} AI Fundamentals

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Predicting Future Values in AI Fundamentals | April 25, 2024 | 1.0 |
| Business Applications of AI in AI Fundamentals | April 21, 2024 | 1.0 |
| Introduction to Artificial Intelligence in AI Fundamentals | April 21, 2024 | 1.0 |

### {{< fa scale-balanced >}} Data Ethics & Risk

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Introduction to Data Ethics in Data Ethics & Risk | April 3, 2024 | 1.0 |

### {{< fa database >}} Data Literacy

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Planning a Data Driven Project in Data Literacy | April 14, 2024 | 1.0 |
| Thinking and Communicating with Data in Data Literacy | March 27, 2024 | 1.5 |
| Introduction to Data Preparation in Data Literacy | March 14, 2024 | 1.0 |
| Introduction to Data and Databases in Data Literacy | March 7, 2024 | 1.0 |

### {{< fa chart-line >}} Data Presentation Skills

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Telling Stories with Data in Data Presentation Skills | April 22, 2024 | 1.0 |
| Presenting Your Data in Data Presentation Skills | April 20, 2024 | 1.0 |
| Communicating Data Effectively in Data Presentation Skills | March 16, 2024 | 1.0 |

### {{< fa lock >}} Data Security

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Handling Data Securely and Responsibly in Data Security | April 22, 2026 | 1.5 |
| Keeping Your Information Safe in Data Security | April 22, 2026 | 1.0 |

### {{< fa file-excel >}} Excel

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Charts in Depth in Excel | April 2024 | 1.0 |
| Lookups and Database Functions in Excel | April 24, 2024 | 2.0 |
| Pivot Tables in Excel | April 16, 2024 | 2.0 |
| Text, Time, and Dates in Excel | March 13, 2024 | 2.0 |
| Finance Functions in Excel | March 8, 2024 | 1.0 |
| Formulas and Functions in Excel | November 24, 2022 | 3.0 |
| Data Manipulation and Formatting in Excel | October 24, 2022 | 2.0 |

### {{< fa chart-bar >}} Power BI

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Introduction to Visualizations in Power BI | June 18, 2024 | 2.0 |
| Building Your First Dashboard in Power BI | June 18, 2024 | 1.5 |

### {{< fa code >}} Python Fundamentals

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Functions, Conditionality and Loops in Python Fundamentals | April 25, 2024 | 2.5 |
| Python Fundamentals in Python Fundamentals | April 25, 2024 | 2.0 |

### {{< fa server >}} SQL

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Understanding SQL Databases in SQL | April 22, 2024 | 1.5 |

### {{< fa chart-pie >}} Statistical Analysis

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Probability Distributions in Statistical Analysis | April 25, 2024 | 2.0 |
| Principles of Statistics in Statistical Analysis | April 18, 2024 | 1.5 |
| Probability Principles in Statistical Analysis | April 17, 2024 | 1.5 |
| Introduction to Predictive Modeling in Statistical Analysis | April 16, 2024 | 2.0 |

### {{< fa table-columns >}} Tableau

| Course | Date | CPD |
|---|---|---|
| Introducing Tableau in Tableau | April 12, 2023 | 1.5 |

## DataCamp

| Course | Date | Length |
|---|---|---|
| Introduction to NumPy | November 25, 2025 | 4 hrs |
